authority: QA preview only; gameplay geometry and time remain manifest-owned

resolution.fact: No valid acknowledgement returned during three signal windows.
The feed emitted its queue and received no reciprocal channel.
A directional override scar crossed the single shadow correction line.
resolution.materialRemainder: one hard shadow that no longer aligns

resolution.fact: The player occupied the overlap while both claims remained active.
resolution.materialRemainder: two edges sharing a small unclaimed notch

resolution.fact: Three completed reads disagreed with the player's following movement.
The seam was crossed during clock disagreement without either claim reaching authority.
resolution.materialRemainder: offset double edge at crossing point

resolution.fact: The binary clock completed its witness window and withdrew without representing twilight.
resolution.materialRemainder: half-changed cable and rectangular time wall residue

resolution.fact: The Eye's read ledger closed with at least one interval remaining unclassified.
resolution.materialRemainder: broken read ring with one blank interval
